Anyone remember the old theme style for Mediacorp channel idents? These are during the 2000s and early 2010s era, and their motion graphics were very aesthetic and visually stunning, with elements of Frutiger Aero and Frutiger Metro Style during that time. Nowadays the channel logo idents are all plain with their normal simplified logo from 2023 onwards.
